book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the expensive price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 5 nights starting from thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel and should serve fusion food
The restaurant should be in the centre
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 17:45 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 16:45
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
